## Description
Provide a summary of the changes introduced by this PR. Detail the motivation, problem solved, and overall approach.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
Please check the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / template (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (cleanups, visual alignment, no functional changes)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the project's styling and typescript conventions.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and `npx tsc --noEmit` locally and both passed without warnings.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (or no updates are required).
- [ ] The layouts are fully responsive and tested on both desktop and mobile viewports.
- [ ] I have not committed any environment variables or credentials in the code.

## Visual Changes / Screenshots
*If your changes alter any component, landing page, or template UI/UX, please attach screenshots or screen recordings showing the changes before and after.*

| Before | After |
| ------ | ----- |
| *Insert image* | *Insert image* |

## Testing
Explain how you verified your changes (e.g. "Tested locally on Chrome and iOS Simulator. Verified Google OAuth callback redirected to `/dashboard` successfully.").
